channel.title: Eldoria and the Lightbringers
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Eldoria and the Lightbringers

item.title: black crystals
item.description: Crystal Cultists item used to further their unknown ideals Carry magical powers based on the cultist magical symbol inscribed on it known symbols: rotten apple Effect: poisons land while whole (see Lowhaven) ladder going into clouds Effect: transform consumer Example: The Prism of the Ascendant Ladd...

item.title: future memory
item.description: narrative description of the Cyclopean ritual the Heroes perform, driven by Leon’s research into the cyclops scroll from Session 1 Phase I: The Offering of Memories The scent of burning kindling mixes with the heavy, organic aroma of the crushed sheep’s heart, the sharp tang of dill, and salt.

item.title: index
item.description: Eldoria SRD Welcome to the Eldoria Pathfinder 1e setting archive.

item.title: Rhett
item.description: Guard-turned PC from Lowhaven. Helped since Session 7 – Beneath Wicklow Fields and particularly knew Noah Whicklow and the map of the area.

item.title: Royal Crown of Eldoria
item.description: Faction / Ruling Authority Overview The Royal Crown of Eldoria is the governing power of the unified kingdom of Emberfall.

item.title: Salty Marrow
item.description: Salty Marrow is a crewmate of The Silver Vulture and serves as an appointed inland guide for the Heroes following the Vulture’s Bargain at the wreckage of the Wreck Island.

item.title: Sanctum_Map_Engine_Guide
item.description: Sunken Sanctum: Map Engine Guide Welcome to the Sunken Sanctum Engine.

item.title: Scales — Endurance
item.description: Draconic Principle Scales represent immortality through resilience.

item.title: Session 9 Loot
item.description: During Session 9 - Oargull and the Southern Forest Curated Loot Real Items (from SRD or 3rd party) Periapt of Wound Closure - www.d20pfsrd.com/magic-items/wondrous-items/m-p/periapt-of-wound-closure/ Recipient intent - Finn (Peaceful barbarian) 15,000 gp Belt of Mighty Hurling - www.d20pfsrd.com/mag...
